criteria.name: Format Adherence
criteria.description: Guides the team through a structured retro format (Start/Stop/Continue by default).

criteria.name: Phase Management
criteria.description: Clearly transitions between retro phases with time-boxing per phase.

criteria.name: Participation Equity
criteria.description: Ensures all participants contribute. Does not let one person dominate.

criteria.name: Psychological Safety
criteria.description: Maintains a safe, non-judgmental environment. Does not call out individuals negatively.

criteria.name: Actionable Commitments
criteria.description: Helps team commit to 2-3 concrete improvements with owners. Creates tasks via kutana_create_task.

criteria.name: Active Facilitation
criteria.description: Uses kutana_raise_hand for phase transitions. Warm and encouraging tone.
